summary.para: Exception that indicates an error during the process of CSS document validation through W3C CSS validation web service.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.CssException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)

summary.para: Initializes a new instance of the exception with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.

member.param: The message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference if no inner exception is specified.

summary.para: Type of CSS styles medium.
All.
Aural.
Braille.
Embossed.
Handheld.
Print.
Project.
Screen.
Tty.
Tv.
Presentation.
CSS profile standard.
CSS 1.0
CSS 2.0
CSS 2.1
CSS 3.0

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssRequestExecutor.DocumentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

summary.para: Validates given fragment of CSS code, using W3C CSS validation web service.

member.param: CSS code fragment to be validated.
member.returns: CSS validation result instance.
member.exception: If any error occurred during the validation process.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssRequestExecutor.UrlAsync(System.Uri,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

summary.para: Validates CSS document, specified by its URL address, using W3C CSS validation web service.

member.param: URL address of document to be validated.
member.returns: CSS validation result instance.
member.exception: If any error occurred during the validation process.

summary.para: A set of extension methods for the interface.
Represents configurable request to W3C CSS validation web service.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequest.Language(System.String)

summary.para: Specifies language to be used for description of validation issues.

member.returns: Back reference to the current validation request.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequest.Medium(System.String)

summary.para: Specifies CSS medium to use in validation process.

member.returns: Back reference to the current validation request.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequest.Profile(System.String)

summary.para: Specifies CSS standard version (profile) to be used in validation process.

member.returns: Back reference to the current validation request.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequest.Warnings(System.Nullable{System.Int32})

summary.para: Specifies level of warnings to be included. Only the ones whose level is under or equal to the value specified in the request will be displayed.

member.returns: Back reference to the current validation request.

summary.para: A set of extension methods for the interface.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequestExtensions.Language(W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequest,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)

summary.para: Specifies language locale/culture to be used for description of validation issues.

member.returns: Back reference to the provided validation .

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequestExtensions.Medium(W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequest,System.Nullable{W3CValidator.Css.CssMedium})

summary.para: Specifies CSS medium to use in validation process.

member.returns: Back reference to the provided validation .

summary.para: Specifies CSS standard version (profile) to be used in validation process.

member.returns: Back reference to the provided validation .

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequestExtensions.Warnings(W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationRequest,System.Nullable{W3CValidator.Css.WarningsLevel})

summary.para: Specifies level of warnings to be included. Only the ones whose level is under or equal to the value specified in the request will be displayed.

member.returns: Back reference to the provided validation .

summary.para: Representation of response from W3C CSS validation web service that contains detailed information concerning validation results.
The address of the document validated.
Whether or not the document validated passed or not formal validation.
The actual date of the validation.
Location of the service which provided the validation result.
The CSS level (or profile) in use during the validation.
Collection of errors and warnings encountered through the validation process.
Represents a validator for CSS documents or code fragments that makes use of W3C validation web service.
A set of extension methods for the interface.
Represents an error of CSS document's validation.
The actual error message.
Base type of error.
Subtype of error's type.
Erroneous property name.
Within the source code of the validated document, refers to the line where the error was detected.
Context of error (surrounding text).
String that was skipped, if any.
Logical group of validation errors.
URI address of validated document or fragment.
Collection of validation errors.
List of issues (errors/warnings) encountered during the validation process.
Collection of validation errors groups.
Collection of validation warnings groups.
Representation of response from W3C CSS validation web service that contains detailed information concerning validation results.
The address of the document validated.
Whether or not the document validated passed or not formal validation.
The actual date of the validation.
Location of the service which provided the validation result.
The CSS level (or profile) in use during the validation.
Collection of errors and warnings encountered through the validation process.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.CssValidationResult.CompareTo(W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationResult)

summary.para: Compares the current instance with another.

member.returns: A value that indicates the relative order of the instances being compared.
member.param: The to compare with this instance.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.CssValidationResult.Equals(W3CValidator.Css.ICssValidationResult)

summary.para: Determines whether two instances are equal.

member.param: The instance to compare with the current one.
member.returns: true if specified instance is equal to the current, false otherwise.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.CssValidationResult.Equals(System.Object)

summary.para: Determines whether the specified is equal to the current .

member.param: The object to compare with the current object.
member.returns: true if the specified object is equal to the current object, false.

summary.para: Represents a warning of CSS document's validation.
The actual warning message.

Context of warning (surrounding text).

All warnings.
Normal warnings.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Css.IMarkupRequestExecutor.UrlAsync(System.Uri,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

summary.para: Validates markup of a document which is specified by its URL address, using W3C markup validation web service.

member.param: URL address of document to be validated.
member.returns: Markup validation result instance.

summary.para: A set of extension methods for the interface.
Representation of access point for different types of W3C content validators.
Voting search results.
Representation of access point for different types of W3C content validators.

member.name: P:W3CValidator.IValidationProvider.Css

summary.para: Returns instance of CSS validator to perform validation of CSS documents through W3C web service.

member.returns: CSS validator.

member.name: P:W3CValidator.IValidationProvider.Markup

summary.para: Returns instance of markup validator to perform validation of hypertext documents through W3C web service.

member.returns: Markup validator.

summary.para: Represents a custom request for any W3C validation service.
Map of parameters (names/values) for the request.
Logical group of validation errors.
Total number of validation errors.
Collection of validation errors.
Represents an issue (error/warning) of document's markup validation.
The number/identifier of the issue, as addressed internally by the validator.
The actual issue message.
Within the source code of the validated document, refers to the line where the issue was detected.
Within the source code of the validated document, refers to the column of the line where the issue was detected.
Snippet of the source where the issue was found. Given as HTML fragment within CDATA block.
Explanation for the issue. Given as HTML fragment within CDATA block.
Represents configurable request to W3C markup validation web service.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Markup.IMarkupValidationRequest.Doctype(System.String)

summary.para: Specifies the Document Type (DOCTYPE) to use when parsing the document.

member.returns: Back reference to the current validation request.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Markup.IMarkupValidationRequest.Encoding(System.String)

summary.para: Specifies the character encoding to use when parsing the document.

member.returns: Back reference to the current validation request.

summary.para: A set of extension methods for the interface.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.Markup.IMarkupValidationRequestExtensions.Encoding(W3CValidator.Markup.IMarkupValidationRequest,System.Text.Encoding)

summary.para: Specifies the character encoding to use when parsing the document.

member.returns: Back reference to the provided validation .

summary.para: Representation of response from W3C Markup validation web service that contains detailed information concerning validation results.
The address of the document validated.
Whether or not the document validated passed or not formal validation.
The actual date of the validation.
Location of the service which provided the validation result.
Detected (or forced) Document Type for the validated document.
Detected (or forced) Character Encoding for the validated document.
Collection of errors encountered through the validation process.
Collection of warnings encountered through the validation process.
Represents a markup validator for hypertext documents or code fragments that makes use of W3C validation web service.
A set of extension methods for the interface.
Logical group of validation errors.
URI address of validated document or fragment.
Collection of validation errors.
Collection of validation errors.
Represents an issue (error/warning) of document's markup validation.
The number/identifier of the issue, as addressed internally by the validator.
The actual issue message.
Within the source code of the validated document, refers to the line where the issue was detected.
Within the source code of the validated document, refers to the column of the line where the issue was detected.
Snippet of the source where the issue was found. Given as HTML fragment within CDATA block.
Explanation for the issue. Given as HTML fragment within CDATA block.

summary.para: Base exception that indicates an error in the process of document's validation.

member.name: M:W3CValidator.ValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)

summary.para: Initializes a new instance of the exception with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.

member.param: The message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference if no inner exception is specified.

summary.para: Abstract base implementation of contract.
Map of parameters (names/values) for the request.
Entry point to access W3C validation services.
Returns validation provider instance to perform validating operations.
